top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 8 agree on the bullish side (8 bullish, 1 bearish); signal-agreement is 45% and overall conviction confidence is 44%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 83% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $51.1M, net income $32.7M).

Breakout level: a sustained close above 25.42 (the 501-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 8.66.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 4.32 (the 501-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.

top.thesis: CoinShares PLC (CSHR) screens constructively, with 6 independent categories pointing favourably — led by competitive position, historical analogs, financial health. The weighted composite score is 71/100, and 6 of the scored categories agree on the bullish side versus 2 on the bearish side — conviction here rests on that breadth of agreement, not on any single category. The main offsetting concern is price technicals (score 14/100). This is a research/screening read of independent evidence, not a prediction or investment advice.

top.technical_summary: Category scores — price technicals 14/100 (confidence 58%), momentum 16/100 (confidence 36%). Latest close 4.20 on 2026-07-17; the available 74-bar window ranged 3.51–10.43. The last close sits at the 10% point of that range (0% = window low, 100% = window high).
top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 6 agree on the bullish side (6 bullish, 2 bearish); signal-agreement is 36% and overall conviction confidence is 38%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 82% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (ownership / insider activity); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs FY2025: revenue $163.2M, net income $114.3M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 58.1%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a other:J by Mognetti Jean-Marie on 2026-03-31; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 10.43 (the 74-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 4.20.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 3.51 (the 74-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: earnings beat: -0.18' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

top.thesis: MainStreet Bancshares, Inc. (MNSB) screens constructively, with 8 independent categories pointing favourably — led by historical analogs, financial health, competitive position. The weighted composite score is 67/100, and 8 of the scored categories agree on the bullish side versus 1 on the bearish side — conviction here rests on that breadth of agreement, not on any single category. The main offsetting concern is management (score 39/100). This is a research/screening read of independent evidence, not a prediction or investment advice.

Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 86% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $17.9M, net income $4.1M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 935.1%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a award by GREEN DARRELL on 2026-07-01; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 25.29 (the 501-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 24.10.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 15.00 (the 501-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.

top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 8 agree on the bullish side (8 bullish, 1 bearish); signal-agreement is 54% and overall conviction confidence is 52%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 86% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $30.1M, net income $10.7M).

Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a buy by LEE SANG YOUNG on 2026-03-06; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 30.84 (the 501-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 29.81.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 16.00 (the 501-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: insider buying: 0.26' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

all_ranked.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 5 agree on the bullish side (5 bullish, 3 bearish); signal-agreement is 32% and overall conviction confidence is 20%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 66% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (historical analogs, ownership / insider activity, business quality); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
